name: Beef Jerky#2 (My Favorite)
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the beef for at least 1 hour, or overnight.
2. Preheat oven to 150-170°C (300-325°F).
3. Slice the marinated beef into thin strips.
4. Place the slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 hours, turning the slices occasionally until fully dried and firm.
6. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
